---
title: "DMR_clones"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-16"
params:
  methrix_qc_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_QC_SNP_filtered/
  isa_path: C:/Users/Casper.deVisser/Documents/ipsc-data-analysis/20240822_Xomics_iPSC_Neurons_new_READ-ONLY.xlsx
  outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DMR/
---


## Libaries
```{r}
library(DSS)
```


```{r}
print(params)
```


```{r}
outdir <- params$outdir

if (!dir.exists(outdir)){
  outdir <- getwd()
}
```


## Complete set of QC Methrix object
```{r}
meth_object <- methrix::load_HDF5_methrix(params$methrix_qc_dir)
```


## Subset DM1 P2 samples
```{r}
all_samples <- meth_object@colData@rownames
DM1_P2_samples <- all_samples[grepl(pattern = 'DM1-p2', all_samples)]
### !! Remove Repeat excised sample !! ###
DM1_P2_samples <- DM1_P2_samples[!grepl(pattern = 'rep', DM1_P2_samples)]

subset_meth <- meth_object[, DM1_P2_samples]
```


## bs object
```{r}
bs_obj <- methrix::methrix2bsseq(subset_meth)
bs_obj
```

## DM1 Design matrix (clones, CRISPR line with clone 1)
```{r}
clone <- c('clone1', 'clone1', 
            'clone2', 'clone2', 'clone2',
            'clone3', 'clone3', 'clone3')

clone1_vs_others <- c('clone1', 'clone1', 
           'other', 'other', 'other',
           'other', 'other', 'other')

clone2_vs_others <- c('other', 'other', 
           'clone2', 'clone2', 'clone2',
           'other', 'other', 'other')

clone3_vs_others <- c('other', 'other',
           'other', 'other', 'other',
           'clone3', 'clone3', 'clone3')


design <- data.frame(clone = factor(clone), 
                     c1_vs_other = factor(clone1_vs_others),
                     c2_vs_other = factor(clone2_vs_others),
                     c3_vs_other = factor(clone3_vs_others))
design$clone <- relevel(design$clone, ref = "clone2")
```


## Clone vs others
```{r}
#dmr_c1_fit <- DMLfit.multiFactor(BSobj = bs_obj, design = design, formula = ~ clone1_vs_others)
dmr_c2_fit <- DMLfit.multiFactor(BSobj = bs_obj, design = design, formula = ~ clone2_vs_others)
#dmr_c3_fit <- DMLfit.multiFactor(BSobj = bs_obj, design = design, formula = ~ clone3_vs_others)
```

## DML 
```{r}
#dml_c1_test <- DMLtest.multiFactor(dmr_c1_fit, coef = "clone1_vs_othersother" )
dml_c2_test <- DMLtest.multiFactor(dmr_c2_fit, coef = "clone2_vs_othersother" )
#dml_c3_test <- DMLtest.multiFactor(dmr_c3_fit, coef = "clone3_vs_othersother" )
```


## Differentially metylated regions (DMRs)
```{r}
#dmrs_c1 <- DSS::callDMR(dml_c1_test, p.threshold = 0.001)
dmrs_c2 <- DSS::callDMR(dml_c2_test, p.threshold = 0.001)
#dmrs_c3 <- DSS::callDMR(dml_c3_test, p.threshold = 0.001)


#write.csv(dmrs_c1, file.path(outdir, 'DMRS_DM1_c1.csv'))
write.csv(dmrs_c2, file.path(outdir, 'DMRS_DM1_c2.csv'))
#write.csv(dmrs_c3, file.path(outdir, 'DMRS_DM1_c3.csv'))
```



# CHD2 clones

## Subset DM1 P2 samples
```{r}
CDH2_P3_samples <- all_samples[grepl(pattern = 'CHD2-p3', all_samples)]
subset_meth <- meth_object[, CDH2_P3_samples]
```

## CHD2 Design matrix (clones, CRISPR line with clone 1)
```{r}
clone <- c('clone1', 'clone1', 'clone1',
            'clone2', 'clone2')

design <- data.frame(clone = factor(clone))
```

## bs object
```{r}
bs_obj <- methrix::methrix2bsseq(subset_meth)
bs_obj
```

## Clone 2 vs others
```{r}
dmr_fit <- DMLfit.multiFactor(BSobj = bs_obj, design = design, formula = ~ clone)
```

## DML test clone 1 vs clone 2
```{r}
dml_test <- DMLtest.multiFactor(dmr_fit, coef = "cloneclone2" )
```


## Model output
```{r}
dmls <- DSS::callDML(dml_test, p.threshold = 0.001)
```

```{r}
dmrs <- DSS::callDMR(dml_test, p.threshold = 0.001)

write.csv(dmrs, file.path(outdir, 'DMRS_CHD2.csv'))
```
